end,function(T)r[T]=r[T]-(-571040-(-571041))if-306432+306432==r[T]then r[T],Z[T]=nil,nil end end,function(T)local O,d=-913269-(-913270),T[637291-637290]while d do r[d],O=r[d]-(182146-182145),(-861461+861462)+O if r[d]==-169741+169741 then r[d],Z[d]=nil,nil end d=T[O]end end,{}return(h(11124687-(-665641),{}))(a(L))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[O(-102818-(-157507))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
